seo.title: Contact Us | Quarterfold Printabilities
seo.description: Talk to Quarterfold about your print programme. Call, email or WhatsApp us, or send an enquiry and hear back within one business day. Offices in Navi Mumbai.

hero.title: Let's Talk. We Reply in One Business Day.
hero.line: Whether you're a ministry, a publisher, or an author with one book, we'd love to hear from you.
hero.callFoot: Mon–Sat, business hours — or send the enquiry form below.

map.alt: Map showing Quarterfold's two locations in Navi Mumbai, India: the Vashi head office and the Taloja main factory.

welcome.eyebrow: We'd love to hear from you
welcome.head: One partner for the whole print journey, from a national textbook programme to a first run of one book.
welcome.sub: Tell us what you're printing and we'll come back within one business day. Pick whichever way is easiest below, or send the enquiry form and we'll take it from there.

form.title: Tell us about your project.
form.lede: A few details are all we need to come back with the right person and a realistic answer. Fields marked with an asterisk are required.
form.messagePlaceholder: Trim size, page count, paper, binding, quantity, delivery country, whatever you have.
form.consent: I agree that Quarterfold may use these details to respond to my enquiry, in line with the <1>Privacy Policy</1>.
form.dpa: We only use what you send here to reply to your enquiry. We never sell your details. See our <1>Privacy Policy</1> for how we handle your data.

errors.enquiry: Choose what your enquiry is about.
errors.message: Tell us a little about what you need.
errors.consent: Please agree to the privacy policy so we can reply.
errors.summaryOne: There is 1 problem with the form. Please review the highlighted fields.
errors.summaryMany: There are {{count}} problems with the form. Please review the highlighted fields.

success.title: Thank you, your enquiry is ready to send.
success.sub: Your email app should have opened with everything filled in. If it didn't, use the button below and we'll reply within one business day.

publishers-0.q: Do you print for publishers outside India?
publishers-0.a: Yes. We serve 250+ publishers worldwide and export more than 800 containers a year to 25+ countries, working with many of the top publishers in India.

publishers-1.q: What print certifications do you hold?
publishers-1.a: We are FSC certified under licence TUVDC COC 101258, alongside ISO and Sedex, so your titles can carry recognised responsible-sourcing and audited-supply marks.

publishers-2.q: Can you handle large offset runs?
publishers-2.a: Yes. Our three facilities across 300,000 sq ft print more than 75 million books a year on web-offset and sheet-fed presses, so we scale comfortably to long runs.

publishers-3.q: Do you manage export and shipping?
publishers-3.a: We handle containerised export, customs documentation and delivery, moving 800+ containers a year to ministries, distributors and publishers across 25+ countries.

institutions-0.q: Do you work with governments and ministries on tenders?
institutions-0.a: Yes. We deliver national textbook programmes for ministries of education, and are a print partner on World Bank and USAID funded programmes.

institutions-1.q: Which countries have you printed national programmes for?
institutions-1.a: We have printed curriculum programmes across 10+ African countries, including Tanzania, Ghana, Nigeria, Ivory Coast and DR Congo.

institutions-2.a: Yes. We are FSC certified under licence TUVDC COC 101258, so programme books can be printed on responsibly sourced paper for tenders that require it.

institutions-3.q: How quickly can you scale for a national rollout?
institutions-3.a: With three facilities, 300,000 sq ft and capacity for 75 million+ books a year, we scale from a single curriculum edition to a full national rollout.

self-0.q: Do you print single copies or short runs?
self-0.a: Yes. Our print-on-demand service is built for self-publishers and independent authors, from a single book to short runs.

self-1.q: Can I see a sample before a full run?
self-1.a: Yes. We can produce samples so you can check trim size, paper and binding before committing to a full print run.

self-2.a: From paperbacks and hardbacks to premium notebooks, diaries and coffee-table books, with hard, soft and leather bindings.

self-3.q: How do I get a quote for one title?
self-3.a: Send your specification, trim size, page count, paper, binding and quantity, using the enquiry form above and we will come back within one business day.
